nodes.body: <<FILL role=beat words=70 beats='the head {WARDEN} asks {HERO} to account for the day, every mark read and creature met and test faced, and to name the one thing that carried {HERO} the whole way through the {THRESHOLD}'>>

choices.label: Answer that it was steadiness and the marks.
Answer that it was mercy shown to the beasts.
Answer that it was luck, and say so plainly.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=beat words=66 beats='the {WARDEN}s will not open the great bar for a latecomer, but one {WARDEN} studies {HERO} and offers the {ALT_PATH}, a harder crossing that earns a lesser but real place if it is walked well'>>

choices.label: Walk the {ALT_PATH} and earn the lesser place.
Refuse, and wait for next season instead.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=62 beats='the head {WARDEN} lays the green cord across {HERO} shoulders and names {HERO} a {WARDEN} of the {THRESHOLD}, the whole test passed and the {Z6_NAME} thrown open on the lit hall beyond'>>
<<FILL role=ending words=60 beats='the {WARDEN}s judge that mercy to the {Z3_SHORT} beasts is the truest {WARDEN} heart of all, and {HERO} is named a {WARDEN} of the {ALT_PATH} with honour'>>
<<FILL role=ending words=58 beats='the {WARDEN}s laugh, not unkindly, at so plain an answer, and name {HERO} a {WARDEN} all the same, for honesty is the first mark they look for'>>

ending.title: Named for a Plain True Answer

nodes.body: <<FILL role=ending words=60 beats='{HERO} walks the {ALT_PATH} through the dark and comes out at dawn footsore but standing, given a real place among the outer {WARDEN}s, a hard crossing well won'>>
<<FILL role=ending words=50 beats='the {Z6_SHORT} {WARDEN}s see {HERO} the moment the shadow moves, and a {TRIAL} ended by sneaking is no pass at all, only a quiet walk back out'>>
<<FILL role=ending words=50 beats='the last {DEADLINE_SIGN} dies while {HERO} sits spent in the grass, the bar stays drawn, and the {TRIAL} is lost to be attempted again when the season turns'>>
<<FILL role=ending words=50 beats='{HERO} will not take a lesser crossing on tired legs, and turns for home to try the whole {TRIAL} again next season with more read in the marks'>>
